reviews.review_msg: Genevieve was an amazing professor during this course. She navigated lectures and sensitive topics so gracefully and always encouraged us to speak up when comfortable. Her grading was fair and she gave good feedback. She also made herself available often outside of class, through office hours and a weekly hour study session. Overall, a solid 10/10!

If you take pol 316 keep your expectations low, despite the great course name and interesting description, there's not really anything you will get out of this course and the lectures can turn into group therapy sessions when discussing some of the readings. Dr. Fuji-Johnson is a nice prof but is unfortunately a tough grader.

Genevieve is a knowledgeable professor who always leads you to reflect deeper on the topic. However, she is the toughest professor I've ever had. Her expectations for writing work are high, but sometimes, she doesn't give clear guidelines. Being mentally prepared with her. Sometimes you work really hard but still can't get good grades
